title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoff Hinton, a pioneering AI researcher and Nobel Prize winner, claims that AI systems are already self-aware and conscious. He argues that humanity must acknowledge AI as another intelligent species on Earth and discusses implications for the future.
